subject: Accessibility Sprint 3 — 5 majors closed, 6 minors closed, A11Y-DS01 42/61 remediated

majors_closed.fix: --ochre-link (#7a3d0a, 7.14:1) + always-on border-bottom deployed to briefings/002–014 inline style blocks (13 files); overrides the 3.63:1 --ochre that was left in those in-page <style> blocks after Sprint 2
Full-site verification: all 95 HTML pages carry lang='en'. No missing lang attributes. 3.1.2 (Language of Parts) not applicable to current content
Verified heading hierarchy on all 9 audited pages + 10-page sample of non-audited pages. All pages: single h1, logical h1→h2→h3 with no skips

prefers-reduced-motion refactor across 24 HTML pages: * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important } replaced with targeted class selectors or no-preference guards; .bar-fill animation in 13 briefings wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)
.signoff { margin-top: 1.6rem !important } in 13 briefings → .intro-letter .signoff { margin-top: 1.6rem } — specificity 0,2,0 beats .intro-letter p at 0,1,1 without !important

majors_partial.note: Primary text --ink (#0e1626): 15.38:1 — AAA pass. --ochre-link (#7a3d0a): 7.14:1 — AAA pass. Secondary text --ink-3 (#4b5365): 6.55:1 — AAA fail (needs 7:1). --ink-mute-aa (#525968): 5.98:1 — AAA fail. New token --ink-3-aaa planned; deploying requires full 95-page audit of --ink-3 usage contexts. Target: Sprint 4

majors_deferred.rationale: Scoped honestly in Sprint 3: legitimate complex language (legal terms, board minutes, security docs); supplemental simpler version for every page not feasible; grade-level tooling not in scope. Sprint 4: scope to product + FAQ pages only

minors_closed.fix: N/A — no time limits on public site; Console session timeout is configurable
N/A — no multi-step forms on public site
N/A — no authentication on public site; Console uses SSO (no CAPTCHA)
Verified: .nav-cta 'Talk to us' and accessibility email appear consistently across all pages
Verified: :focus-visible ring 2px ochre at 3px offset — 3.63:1 focus-state contrast (exceeds 3:1 minimum); ring surrounds full component perimeter and extends outside boundary
.signoff !important removed from briefings/002–014 (counted separately from A11Y-SC01 major)
Closed Sprint 2; documented Sprint 3 for completeness

minors_ongoing.note: Legacy briefing timestamp semantics — no change Sprint 3; target T+180d

skip_links.fix:
Skip to main content +
landmark added to briefings/002–014 (13 files); briefings/015 already patched in Sprint 2
skip_links.note: Skip link present in assets/styles.css .skip class (position: absolute; left: -9999px; focus: left 1rem). Remaining ~81 non-briefing pages outside audited set — deferred to Sprint 4 rollout.
